assertions.title: Displays current streak number and label

steps.action: Run test: 'should display current streak number and "day streak" label' with currentStreak=5
steps.observed: Test passed - streak count '5' and 'day streak' label found in document

steps.action: Run test: 'should display 0 when no streak exists' with currentStreak=0
steps.observed: Test passed - '0' and 'day streak' found in document

tests: should display current streak number and "day streak" label
should display 0 when no streak exists

assertions.title: Shows correct emoji for streak ranges

steps.action: Run test: 'should show 📚 emoji when streak is 0'
steps.observed: Test passed - 📚 found in document

steps.action: Run test: 'should show 🔥 for streak 1-6' (iterates 1 through 6)
steps.observed: Test passed - 🔥 found, 🔥🔥 and 🔥🔥🔥 not found for all values 1-6

steps.action: Run test: 'should show 🔥🔥 for streak 7-29' (tests 7, 14, 29)
steps.observed: Test passed - 🔥🔥 found for streaks 7, 14, 29

steps.action: Run test: 'should show 🔥🔥🔥 for streak 30+' (tests 30, 60, 100)
steps.observed: Test passed - 🔥🔥🔥 found for streaks 30, 60, 100

tests: should show 📚 emoji when streak is 0
should show 🔥 for streak 1-6
should show 🔥🔥 for streak 7-29
should show 🔥🔥🔥 for streak 30+

assertions.title: Displays appropriate streak message per state

steps.action: Run test: streak=0, atRisk=false → 'Start your learning journey today!'
steps.observed: Test passed

steps.action: Run test: streak=5, atRisk=true → "Don't break your streak! Study today!"
steps.observed: Test passed

steps.action: Run test: streak=1, atRisk=false → 'Great start! Come back tomorrow!'
steps.observed: Test passed

steps.action: Run test: streak=3, atRisk=false → '4 more days to earn your first badge!'
steps.observed: Test passed

steps.action: Run test: streak=10, atRisk=false → 'Amazing dedication! Keep it up!'
steps.observed: Test passed

tests: should show "Start your learning journey" when streak is 0
should show at-risk message when streak is at risk
should show "Great start" message when streak is 1 and not at risk
should show "more days to earn your first badge" for streak 2-6
should show "Amazing dedication" message for streak >= 7 and not at risk

steps.action: Run test: longestStreak=10 → 'Longest Streak' section present
steps.expected: Section rendered with 'Longest Streak' text and '10 days'
steps.observed: Test passed - 'Longest Streak' and /10 days/ found in document

steps.action: Run test: longestStreak=0 → 'Longest Streak' section absent
steps.observed: Test passed - 'Longest Streak' not found in document

tests: should show longest streak section when longestStreak > 0
should hide longest streak section when longestStreak is 0

assertions.title: Renders 7-day activity calendar with day labels

steps.action: Run test with system time 2025-01-15 (Wednesday), 7 days of activity data
steps.observed: Test passed - 'Last 7 Days', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat', 'Sun', 'Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed' all found in document

tests: should render 7-day activity calendar with correct day-of-week abbreviations

steps.action: Run test: 0 activities → 'empty' class on all 7 cells
steps.observed: Test passed - 7 empty cells found

steps.action: Run test: 1-2 activities → 'low' class
steps.expected: Cells with activities 1 and 2 have 'activity-cell low' class
steps.observed: Test passed - 2 low cells found

steps.action: Run test: 3-5 activities → 'medium' class
steps.expected: Cells with activities 3 and 5 have 'activity-cell medium' class
steps.observed: Test passed - 2 medium cells found

steps.action: Run test: 6+ activities → 'high' class
steps.expected: Cells with activities 6 and 10 have 'activity-cell high' class
steps.observed: Test passed - 2 high cells found

tests: should apply "empty" class for 0 activities
should apply "low" class for 1-2 activities
should apply "medium" class for 3-5 activities
should apply "high" class for 6+ activities

assertions.title: Shows activity count badge only when > 0

steps.action: Run test: day with 3 activities → count badge rendered
steps.observed: Test passed - '3' found in document

steps.action: Run test: only 1 of 7 days has activity → exactly 1 .activity-count span
steps.observed: Test passed - exactly 1 activity-count span found

tests: should show activity count for days with activity
should not show activity count span for days with 0 activities

steps.action: Run test with streak=3, next milestone '7-Day Warrior' at 42.86%
steps.expected: Milestone name 'Next: 7-Day Warrior', '3/7 days', progress bar width 42.86%
steps.observed: Test passed - 'Next: 7-Day Warrior' and '3/7 days' found, milestone-fill has width: '42.86%'

tests: should render next milestone progress bar with name, days, and progress

assertions.title: Hides next milestone when all achieved

steps.action: Run test: all 5 milestones with achieved=true
steps.observed: Test passed - 'Next:' text not found in document

tests: should hide next milestone section when all milestones are achieved

steps.action: Run test: 2 achieved milestones (7-Day Warrior, 2-Week Champion)
steps.expected: 'Achievements' section present, badge elements with correct titles
steps.observed: Test passed - 'Achievements' found, elements with title '7-Day Warrior' and '2-Week Champion' found

steps.action: Run test: 0 achieved milestones
steps.observed: Test passed - 'Achievements' not found in document

tests: should render achieved milestone badges when at least one milestone is achieved
should not render achievements section when no milestones are achieved

assertions.title: Applies at-risk CSS class when streak at risk

steps.action: Run test: atRisk=true → '.streak-message.at-risk' class present
steps.observed: Test passed - '.streak-message.at-risk' element found in container

steps.action: Run test: atRisk=false → '.streak-message.at-risk' class absent
steps.observed: Test passed - '.streak-message.at-risk' element not found

tests: should apply at-risk CSS class to streak message when at risk
should not apply at-risk class when not at risk

assertions.title: Refreshes data when refreshKey prop changes

steps.action: Run test: render with refreshKey=1, then rerender with refreshKey=2
steps.expected: StreakTracker methods called again after refreshKey change
steps.observed: Test passed - getStreakInfo, getRecentActivity, getStreakMilestones, isStreakAtRisk all called once after rerender

steps.action: Run test: render with refreshKey=1, then rerender with same refreshKey=1
steps.observed: Test passed - getStreakInfo not called after same-key rerender

tests: should re-fetch data when refreshKey prop changes
should not re-fetch data when re-rendered with same refreshKey

summary: Tested 12 assertions (VAL-STREAK-COMP-001 through VAL-STREAK-COMP-012): all 12 passed. StudyStreak test suite has 33 tests total (21 covering the 12 validation assertions + 12 additional edge cases). Full test suite (426 tests across 19 suites) passes with no failures.
